events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen track featuring one of his incredible solos?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! The energy he brings to the stage is still unmatched. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV officially launched, changing the music landscape forever with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the day music videos took over? 45 years ago, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Flashback
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, Woodstock began! Three days of peace, music, and mud that defined a generation. Which iconic performance would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on this day in 1977.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since we lost the King. His music and influence continue to shape generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' iconic frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer and the voice of The Pretenders. What's your favourite song by her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad Fer It Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll attitude. What's your top track from the Manchester icon?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' legendary co-founder, John Lennon, born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Imagine The Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His message of peace and love resonates as strongly as ever. Which of his songs means the most to you?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Genius Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From 'Monty Python' to 'Fawlty Towers', his comedic genius is timeless. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?
